description: Cumulative prediction log for AtollSphere. v1.4.0 adds three fields to every entry per ARCHITECTURE.md v1.2.1 Section 12 Step 6: confidence_at_prediction (confidence level assigned when prediction was made), heuristics_applied (which of H1-H6 informed the prediction), dominant_disconfirmation_condition (what evidence would produce CONTRADICTED — mandatory for WATCH, PARTIAL, AMBIGUOUS). All entries from Editions 001-019 included. No silent drops. Backfilled fields marked BACKFILL where not recorded at time of original prediction.

predictions.flag_text: Futures volume anomaly: pre-war window insider knowledge pattern. BETS OFF Act, Trump Jr./Polymarket conflict, federal prosecutors involved.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: CIT proceedings closed without referral or Section 122 action — would produce CONTRADICTED

predictions.flag_text: Russia/China veto UNSC Hormuz resolution.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Russia and China vetoed UNSC Hormuz resolution — Edition 009 confirmed

predictions.flag_text: Iran-Oman Hormuz protocol subsumed into ceasefire coordination language — toll model emerging as quasi-permanent feature.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: Hormuz reopened fully without formal toll protocol — free transit restored — would produce CONTRADICTED. Upgrade to DEVELOPING if Oman formally participates in transit coordination.
predictions.confirming_evidence: Euronews reports Iran and Oman expected to charge transit fees — not yet formalised at Ed018 sweep

predictions.flag_text: Araghchi confirms 10-point plan as negotiation basis. Islamabad window opens.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Iranian delegation arrived Islamabad 11 April. 10-point plan confirmed as basis per Trump Truth Social and Araghchi X
predictions.outcome: RESOLVED — Islamabad window opened. Iranian delegation confirmed attended. 10-point plan tabled as basis.

predictions.flag_text: WSO Colonel recovered alive from Iranian territory.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: WSO Colonel recovered alive 05 April. SEAL Team Six operation. CIA deception involved. Two MC-130Js destroyed.

predictions.flag_text: Section 122 CIT oral arguments scheduled.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: CIT case dismissed or Section 122 proceedings formally closed without oral arguments — would produce CONTRADICTED

predictions.flag_text: GCC emergency meeting within 48h of UNSC veto. Monitor post-ceasefire positioning.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: Ceasefire expires 22 April without GCC emergency meeting convened — would produce CONTRADICTED

predictions.flag_text: Sixth deadline mechanism confirmed — Tuesday 8pm ET ceasefire announcement.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Ceasefire announced Trump Truth Social 7 April (8pm ET). Sixth deadline mechanism confirmed.

predictions.flag_text: Houthi BAM threat not activated. Ceasefire suspends trigger condition.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: Houthis formally activate BAM closure or conduct confirmed attack on BAM shipping — would produce CONTRADICTED. Note: senior Iranian source threatened BAM closure if situation escalates (Ed018) — monitor.
predictions.confirming_evidence: BAM not activated through Ed019 sweep (1600 GMT 11 April 2026)
predictions.contradicting_evidence: Senior Iranian source threatened BAM closure if situation escalates — Ed018 signal

predictions.flag_text: SAR constraint moot — WSO recovery removes operational pressure.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: WSO Colonel recovered alive 05 April — SAR constraint removed

predictions.flag_text: India oil waiver — GL 134A lapsed 11 April; GL U (Iranian crude) expires 19 April. GL 134B NOT on OFAC register at Ed019 sweep (1600 GMT). 15 April trigger active.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: GL U renewed beyond 19 April without Hormuz deal — would produce H-D3 (energy market stability prioritised over sanctions leverage) and partially CONTRADICT the escalation framing. GL 134B issued before 15 April — would produce CONTRADICTED.
predictions.confirming_evidence: GL 134A lapsed 1201 EDT 11 April confirmed. GL 134B not on OFAC register at 1221 GMT Ed018 sweep. GL 134B NOT on OFAC register at 1600 GMT Ed019 sweep — GL 134B absence on Islamabad Day 1 may be deliberate leverage signal (H6 suppressed intersection flagged — cannot distinguish at sweep time). 15 April trigger active: no GL 134B by 15 April = ESCALATING CONFIRMED.

status_history.status: ESCALATING — GL 134A lapsed confirmed, GL 134B not issued
ESCALATING — GL 134B NOT on OFAC register at 1600 GMT Ed019 sweep. 15 April trigger active. H6 suppressed intersection flagged (deliberate leverage signal vs administrative gap — indeterminate).

predictions.flag_text: OPEC+ reversal of 206,000 b/d increase — expected producer bloc fracture under war pressure.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.contradicting_evidence: OPEC+ 206,000 b/d increase proceeded without reversal — producer bloc cohesion held
predictions.outcome: CONTRADICTED — PMM triggered. Hypothesis B confirmed. Analysis underweighted producer bloc cohesion. System change: producer bloc solidarity treated as prior in OPEC+ cases.

predictions.flag_text: No Iranian power plant strikes before ceasefire — Trump threat deters but does not execute.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: No power plant strikes confirmed before ceasefire 8 April

predictions.flag_text: Trump/Vance public statement on enrichment — formal no-enrichment position stated by 10 April 18:00 BST.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Trump stated 'no enrichment of uranium' 8 April — Tier 1
predictions.contradicting_evidence: Formal enrichment framework for talks not confirmed in writing
predictions.outcome: PARTIAL — Trump stated no enrichment 8 April (C3 satisfied). Formal written enrichment framework not confirmed (C2 partially satisfied).

predictions.flag_text: Hezbollah formal ceasefire adherence statement by 09 April 17:00 GMT.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: No formal statement issued by Hezbollah by window close — would produce CONTRADICTED
predictions.contradicting_evidence: No statement issued. Hezbollah subsequently resumed fire. Naim Kassem called on Lebanese government to 'stop giving free concessions'.
predictions.outcome: CONTRADICTED — PMM triggered. H1 misapplied — Hezbollah has no structural incentive to issue formal compliance statement. System change: Entry 001 SYSTEM_CHANGE_LOG — named-party statement predictions require incentive analysis before C3 satisfied.

predictions.flag_text: Iran's delegation at Islamabad formally tables written 10-point plan explicitly including uranium enrichment rights, causing US to issue public red line statement before talks conclude.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Iran 10-point plan confirmed as negotiation basis. Enrichment contradiction surfaced.
predictions.contradicting_evidence: Written 10-point plan not formally tabled as standalone document. US red line statement on enrichment not issued as formal statement.
predictions.outcome: PARTIAL — enrichment contradiction surfaced but written 10-point plan not formally tabled as predicted.

predictions.flag_text: Hezbollah issues formal statement by 09 April 17:00 GMT stating it will not observe ceasefire unless Israel halts Lebanon strikes.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Hezbollah unnamed official confirmed non-adherence. Hezbollah resumed fire.
predictions.contradicting_evidence: Formal named statement not issued — unnamed official only.
predictions.outcome: PARTIAL — Hezbollah unnamed official confirmed non-adherence. Formal named statement not issued per Entry 001 rule.

predictions.flag_text: Islamabad first session produces ceasefire extension only — no binding framework on Hormuz, enrichment, or Lebanon.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: BACKFILL — not recorded at time of prediction
predictions.confirming_evidence: Islamabad session one produced ceasefire extension as sole output. Wikipedia forward record confirms talks continued April 26, May 11, June 24 — no binding framework.

predictions.flag_text: Formal ceasefire extension of 14+ days beyond 22 April announced by US and Iran before 22 April 2026.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: No extension announced before 22 April and ceasefire expires — war resumes — would produce CONTRADICTED

predictions.flag_text: Islamabad proximity talks produce written joint communique or agreed framework document by 14 April 2026.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: Iranian or US delegation departs Islamabad without issuing any joint statement or agreed document before 14 April — would produce CONTRADICTED
predictions.confirming_evidence: Both delegations arrived Islamabad 11 April. Talks commenced. Vance met Sharif. Iranian delegation met Sharif and Munir. No communique at 1221 GMT Ed018 sweep. Ed019 (1600 GMT): talks confirmed as at least partially DIRECT — analytically significant format upgrade from proximity (first US-Iran direct high-level engagement since 1979). No communique at 1600 GMT Ed019. No departure. Window remains open through 14 April.

predictions.flag_text: Israel agrees verifiable pause or reduction in Lebanon strikes at or before 15 April Washington talks.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: Israel intensifies Lebanon strikes at or after 15 April Washington talks with no pause — would produce CONTRADICTED. Washington talks cancelled entirely — would produce CONTRADICTED.
predictions.contradicting_evidence: Strikes continued 11 April. 13 Lebanese security forces killed Nabatieh 10 April. Netanyahu stated strikes would continue with force, precision and determination. Ed019: Nabatieh strikes 11 April — 10 killed including 3 emergency workers. Washington talks (Israel-Lebanon) confirmed for next week but framed as preliminary only by Lebanese source — not yet a verifiable pause signal.

predictions.flag_text: IRGC or affiliated attack targets Abqaiq processing facility or Yanbu Red Sea terminal before 22 April.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: No new IRGC strikes on Abqaiq or Yanbu through 22 April — would produce H-E1 (no further strikes)
predictions.confirming_evidence: ESA Copernicus satellite imagery confirmed smoke and fire at Abqaiq processing facility 8 April 2026. IRGC drone strike confirmed. CRITICAL tag activated.
predictions.outcome: CONFIRMED — Abqaiq struck 8 April 2026. ESA satellite imagery confirmed. PMM not triggered (CONFIRMED outcome).

predictions.flag_text: Hormuz daily transit volume fails to reach 15 ships/day at any point before 15 April 2026, confirming IRGC toll model as durable ceasefire-proof mechanism.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: Verified transit volume exceeds 15 ships/day for three or more consecutive days before 15 April — would produce CONTRADICTED. Single-day spike above 15 without sustained follow-through = AMBIGUOUS.
predictions.confirming_evidence: Day 1: 5 ships. Day 2: 7 ships. Day 3 ceasefire: 2 ships (lowest since ceasefire). Day 4 (Ed019 sweep): ~handful to ~10 ships/day (Kpler/MarineTraffic/CNN) — well below 15/day threshold. Primarily Chinese tankers and bulk carriers. AIS single-source constraint flagged (MarineTraffic, Kpler, S&P Global share AIS network — Gate 0.5 applies). 600+ large vessels stranded. PRED-018-B on track toward CONFIRMED.

predictions.flag_text: IRGC conducts follow-on strike on Saudi Aramco Yanbu Red Sea terminal before 22 April ceasefire expiry.
predictions.dominant_disconfirmation_condition: No IRGC strike on Yanbu through 22 April and Abqaiq repair confirmed — would produce H-E1. Non-Yanbu Aramco strike — ESCALATING maintained but prediction not confirmed.
